message:
feat(cli): add command-line interface module

New module closing the last completely-missing upstream module (cli/):

Output formatting: text/json/json-pretty with parse from string.

CLI config: output_format, color_mode, verbose, quiet with
environment variable detection (ASX_FORMAT, ASX_COLOR, ASX_VERBOSE,
ASX_QUIET).

Progress display: start/update/complete with percentage and done
queries for CLI progress bars.

Error reporting: report_error (with status code context),
report_warning, report_info (quiet-mode aware).

Signal tracking: record_signal, signal_count, is_cancelled,
should_force_quit (for ctrl-C / double-ctrl-C handling).

17 API functions. Exposed from umbrella header. Feature table updated
(22 features available, 0 deferred).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
